scripts.dev: node ../scripts/sync-plot-summary-shared.mjs && node ../scripts/sync-prompt-preset-shared.mjs && node ../scripts/sync-portrait-media-shared.mjs && tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.build: node ../scripts/sync-plot-summary-shared.mjs && node ../scripts/sync-prompt-preset-shared.mjs && node ../scripts/sync-portrait-media-shared.mjs && tsc && node --input-type=module -e "import {mkdirSync,copyFileSync} from 'node:fs'; mkdirSync('dist/admin',{recursive:true}); copyFileSync('src/admin/index.html','dist/admin/index.html')"
scripts.test: node ../scripts/sync-plot-summary-shared.mjs && node ../scripts/sync-prompt-preset-shared.mjs && node ../scripts/sync-portrait-media-shared.mjs && node --import tsx --test src/**/*.test.ts ../plugins/trace-keeper/src/**/*.test.ts
